::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| **Session \#** | **Date and time**         | **Specific topic**                                | **TODO for this class**                                                         | **Estimated workload (h)** |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1              | 03.03.2026                | Organization and introduction to fMRI             | nothing                                                                         | 0                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 2              | 10.03.2026                | fMRI Paradigm design                              | Install PsychoPy, go through the tutorial                                       | 2                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 3              | 17.03.2026                | Project slam                                      | Prepare a presentation of your project                                          | 4                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
|                | 24.03.2026                | no class                                          |                                                                                 |                            |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 4              | 14.04.2026 (only Natalia) | Implementation slam                               | Implement your project in PsychoPy, show it to the class                        | 8                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 5              | 21.04.2026                | Experiment feedback,                              | Every course participant performs 3 rounds of the experiment and gives feedback | 1                          |
|                |                           |                                                   |                                                                                 |                            |
|                |                           | Data management                                   |                                                                                 |                            |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 6              | 28.04.2026                | Data acquisition in the MRI Lab                   | Neurodesk registration                                                          | 2                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 7              | 05.05.2026                | Preprocessing                                     | Run MRIQC                                                                       | 1                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 8              | 12.05.2026                | Analysis: General linear model                    | Run preprocessing                                                               | 4                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 9              | 19.05.2026                | Result visualization and reporting                | Volume space analysis                                                           | 4                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 10             | 02.06.2026                | Analysis: Other analyses types                    | Surface space analysis                                                          | 4                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 11             | 09.06.2026                | Result presentation slam                          | Prepare a poster with images                                                    | 8                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 12             | 16.06.2026 (only Anja)    | Writing an fMRI article                           | Read an example fMRI article                                                    | 2                          |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
| 13             | 23.06.2026                | Final session (study examples), course evaluation | Report draft (voluntary)                                                        |                            |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+
|                | tba                       | Report deadline                                   |                                                                                 | 23                         |
+----------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------+

: Course schedule {#tbl-schedule tbl-colwidths="\[10,20,30,30,10\]"} (subject to changes)
:::
